name: Engineering Swarm (Full-Stack)
description: Multi-agent squad for autonomous software development from spec to deployment.

agents.goal: Review the core infrastructure files and generate an Architectural Decision Record summarizing the plan.
agents.name: Arquiteto Chefe

agents.goal: Monitor the architectural specs and write modular code matching the requirements. Run linters to ensure quality.
agents.name: Desenvolvedor Full-Stack

agents.goal: Scan generated files for obvious hardcoded secrets or vulnerabilities.
agents.name: Auditor de Segurança

agents.goal: Create and validate Dockerfiles to ensure the application environments are reproducible.
agents.name: Engenheiro DevOps
